description_long: A wooden serving board holds an assortment of sushi, including several pieces of salmon nigiri and maki rolls with visible seaweed wrapping and colorful fillings. To the side, a small rectangular dish contains soy sauce, and a neat pile of pink pickled ginger sits nearby. A small mound of green wasabi is placed between the sushi and the condiments. A pair of dark chopsticks rests on the board, ready for use. The sushi pieces are arranged in an orderly fashion, showcasing the vibrant orange of the salmon and the contrasting dark green of the nori. The overall presentation is clean and appetizing, typical of a Japanese sushi platter served in urban eateries.
description: A wooden board displays assorted sushi, including salmon nigiri, maki rolls, wasabi, pickled ginger, soy sauce, and chopsticks. The arrangement is colorful and visually appealing.
description_view_0: Front view shows salmon nigiri and maki rolls lined up on a wooden board, with wasabi, ginger, and soy sauce dish visible to the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlights the maki rolls and nigiri, with the soy sauce dish and ginger more prominent in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the maki rolls, with chopsticks and condiments more visible on the left side.
description_view_3: Top-down view displays the full assortment of sushi, condiments, and chopsticks, emphasizing the organized layout.
